name_en: M62650 Blue Denim! Key Wallet Wallet Series. This zippered coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with calf leather trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard weaving technology and features a stonewashed denim effect. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm.
name_cn: M62650 Blue Denim! Key Wallet Wallet Series. This zippered coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with calf leather trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard weaving technology and features a stonewashed denim effect. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm.

specs.rawTitle: M62650 Blue Denim! Key Wallet Wallet Series. This zippered coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with calf leather trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLd pattern using jacquard weaving technology and features a stonewashed denim effect. 12 x 7 x 1.5 cm.
